title: Update BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL with contract syntax + skip operators + personal layer mention
description: Extend byte-locked BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL `## Cite policy` section to document operator-based contract syntax (5 operators) + skip:<reason> opt-out + decisions/pitfalls强制 contract / models reference / guidelines+processes 推 LLM-judge type routing. Add personal layer mention to `## 知识库(KB)` Discovery bullet. Update bootstrap-canonical.test invariants accordingly.

files.target: BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL constant L61-L83 (specifically L75-L82 `## Cite policy` section + L70 Discovery bullet)
files.change: Update `## Cite policy` section to add 3 new bullets (kept verbatim text in this task brief): (1) contract 语法: 'decisions/pitfalls 类引用必须在尾段加 contract: `→ <operator> [<operator> ...]`,operator ∈ {`edit:<glob>` `!edit:<glob>` `require:<symbol>` `forbid:<symbol>` `skip:<reason>`}'; (2) skip reason 词典: 'sequencing | conditional | semantic | aesthetic | architectural | other:<text>'; (3) type 路由: 'models 类引用为 reference cite,不需要 contract;guidelines/processes 类暂不强制,推后 LLM-judge'. Update Discovery bullet (L70) to: 'SessionStart hook 列 broad-scoped 条目(含 personal layer `KP-*` 条目,引用方式相同);edit 文件时 PreToolUse hook 可能触发 narrow hint。'.

Add assertions: contains '→ edit:', 'skip:<reason>', 'sequencing | conditional | semantic', 'models 类引用为 reference cite', 'KP-*'. Update byte-length minimum from 400 to 800 (text approximately doubles in size). Keep existing assertions for '## Cite policy' / 'planned|recalled|chained-from' / 'dismissed' / 'fab doctor --cite-coverage'.

implementation: Read packages/shared/src/templates/bootstrap-canonical.ts:61-83 to confirm current canonical body byte-exact.
Insert 3 new bullets within `## Cite policy` section between existing `[recalled]` 验证 bullet and dismissed reason bullet — preserve markdown bullet style (- **触发**: ...).
Modify the Discovery bullet in `## 知识库(KB)` section to mention KP-* personal layer.
Add new assertions per files[].change directive.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared test bootstrap-canonical` to confirm green.

reference.pattern: Byte-locked canonical constant + symmetric test invariants
reference.examples: rc.19 added BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL with two H2s; rc.20 added `## Cite policy` H2 + assertions; rc.24 extends `## Cite policy` H2 with contract syntax bullets.

rationale.chosen_approach: Inline contract syntax in canonical so all 3 client managed blocks propagate via existing fab install writer.
alternatives_considered: Separate cite-contract.md file (rejected: adds second managed-block writer path)
Hook-side runtime injection (rejected: AI doesn't read hook scripts)
decision_factors: Single source of truth for protocol text
rationale.tradeoffs: BOOTSTRAP byte size grows from ~1KB to ~2KB; acceptable since pre-launch corpus.

manual_checks: Visual diff of BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL to confirm bullet ordering preserved
success_metrics: Zero regressions in shared test suite

criteria: BOOTSTRAP_CANONICAL contains string 'models 类引用为 reference cite'
bootstrap-canonical.test.ts adds ≥5 new assertions (grep new test names)
Commit msg: 'feat(rc24): canonical cite-contract syntax + personal layer mention (TASK-02)'
